text:
Tuffdy (タフディー, Tafudī) was a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Momoze Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 until her death. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 He also served as a spy for Queen Swinko-swinko. 

Appearance

Tuffdy was a tall, well-built man with a mashed-in nose, a cleft chin, and short, fair hair.

Personality

Tuffdy was willing to kill Prince Momoze in order to curry favor for whoever would become the next king of Kakin, regardless of his employer and his instructions. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

While Prince Momoze sleeps in her bedroom, Tuffdy plots, and eventually carries out, the murder of Momoze. After Momoze's murder, her royal guards are taken into custody by the Kakin Royal Army to be interrogated about the murder. Hanzo suspects him or Nagmum (the two who were on break) as the one who murdered the prince with a double. The following night, Hanzo appears in Tuffdy's cell through his Hanzo Skill 4, informing him that he has been scouted by Prince Benjamin for his assassination of Momoze. The ninja tricks Tuffdy to confess being the sole person who committed the murder and revealing his Nen ability. When Tuffdy asks Hanzo how he found him out, Hanzo responds he decided to test him first on a whim and snaps his neck with a curled up blanket from his bed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 

Kurapika mentions Tuffdy in a phone conversation he has with Queen Sevanti's Captain Royal Guard Vergei. It's discussed that Tuffdy was the culprit behind Prince Momoze's murder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 374 

Abilities & Powers

Despite being a Nen user, Tuffdy did not appear to be much stronger than a regular human physically, as he could neither break free from Hanzo's grasp nor tear the cloth used to break his neck. 

Nen

Tuffdy was proficient in Conjuration, Manipulation, and possibly also Emission. However, Hatsu seems to be all he was skilled at, as he was easily subdued and killed by Hanzo with a cloth.
